# Sound Blog

> Sound Blog turns voice recordings into polished, publish-ready blog posts with AI transcription, rewriting, editing, and text-to-speech playback.

Sound Blog is a web application for creators, founders, writers, marketers, students, and teams who prefer speaking their ideas before publishing them as written content.

## Core Capabilities

- Record audio in the browser or upload an audio file.
- Validate user access and available credits before processing.
- Transcribe voice recordings into text.
- Generate structured blog posts from transcripts.
- Let users choose tone, target length, structure, and content enhancements.
- Edit generated Markdown blog drafts.
- Generate text-to-speech playback for completed blog posts.

## Public Pages

- [Home](https://sound-blog.com/): Product overview and demo.
- [Demo](https://sound-blog.com/demo): Interactive product demo.
- [Pricing](https://sound-blog.com/pricing): Free, Hobby, and Pro plans.
- [Privacy Policy](https://sound-blog.com/privacy): Data privacy information.
- [Sign In](https://sound-blog.com/sign-in): User authentication.
- [Sign Up](https://sound-blog.com/sign-up): New account registration.

## Authenticated Pages

- [Dashboard](https://sound-blog.com/dashboard): User's blog post overview and management.
- [Record](https://sound-blog.com/record): Audio recording and upload interface.
- [Editorial](https://sound-blog.com/editorial): Blog post editing and publishing workflow.
- [Profile](https://sound-blog.com/profile): Account settings and credit management.

## Product Positioning

Sound Blog is best described as an AI voice-to-blog generator, AI writing assistant, audio transcription workflow, and content creation tool for turning spoken thoughts into publishable articles.

## Keywords

AI blog generator, voice to blog, voice notes to blog posts, AI voice to blog generator, audio to blog post, audio transcription app, AI writing assistant, speech to text blog generator, content creation tool, blog writing software, transcribe audio to article, text to speech blog reader, AI content creation for creators, AI writing tool for founders, voice note transcription for writers.
